channel.title: Latency on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Latency on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: CodeAct pattern and Hyperlight containers in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now includes the CodeAct pattern in public preview. It lets agents execute multi-step plans as a single code block instead of sequential tool calls, which reduced end-to-end latency in representative workloads.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: ai: How to run evals for the model router
item.description:
The post explains how to evaluate the Foundry model router using an open-source GitHub repo for router-aware eval pipelines. It covers running quality, cost, and latency evaluations.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
